description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a prominent suppressor attached to the end of its barrel. The rifle has a detachable curved magazine, a fixed carry handle with integrated iron sights, and a collapsible stock at the rear. The handguard is cylindrical and textured for grip, while the receiver and trigger assembly are robust and angular. The suppressor extends the length of the barrel, giving the weapon a streamlined, elongated profile. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of contemporary urban firearms.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a suppressor, collapsible stock, and detachable curved magazine, featuring a carry handle and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the suppressor, curved magazine, collapsible stock, and carry handle clearly.
description_view_1: Angled top view highlighting the length of the suppressor and the alignment of the carry handle and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view emphasizing the collapsible stock and the top of the receiver and handguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, magazine, and the other side of the carry handle.
